programme.title: Listing Large
programme.desc: Odeen and Lamont make plans outside of work, reluctant to label it a date. Crystal and Stefan clash over her new role and his priorities.

programme.title: Listing Large
programme.desc: Odeen’s sister Brittany flies into town and pressures Odeen to spill the tea on what’s really going on between her and Lamont.

programme.title: Listing Large
programme.desc: Odeen goes above and beyond to finish off the investment house to surprise Lamont but he may have a surprise of his own.

programme.title: Staying Inn: Hotel Julie
programme.desc: Autumn and Jillian begin the renovation of a 19th century inn in Stratford, Ont., starting with the smallest suite in the hotel.

programme.title: Staying Inn: Hotel Julie
programme.desc: The team tackle their first full-sized suite and the construction crew runs into a problem that could affect the entire renovation.

programme.title: Staying Inn: Hotel Julie
programme.sub-title: Double The Room, Double The Fun
programme.desc: Autumn and Jillian face a suite with twice the bathrooms and bedrooms.

programme.title: Cross Country Cake Off
programme.desc: Mary and Andrew rendezvous in Montreal to taste eight Quebecers’ cakes. The top four bake “After Dark” cakes for a spot in the finale.

programme.title: Cross Country Cake Off
programme.desc: The qualifying round ends in the East with eight Atlantic cake makers. Four are chosen to bake their “Bucket List” cake for the judges.

programme.title: Cross Country Cake Off
programme.desc: The top cake makers from each region come together in the CROSS COUNTRY CAKE OFF kitchen to bake for the grand prize in the national finale.

programme.title: Cross Country Cake Off
programme.desc: The West’s best cake makers present their creations to judges Mary Berg and Andrew Han. The best move on to bake for a spot in the finale.

programme.title: Cross Country Cake Off
programme.desc: Mid-Canada’s cake makers present their edible art. The best move on to bake a “Holiday Memories” cake in the Cross Country Cake Off kitchen.

programme.title: Pressure's On
programme.desc: Host Vanessa Gianfrancesco cooks up a Vegetarian Chili, Salted Caramel Cheesecake and other recipes in her multi-cooker.

programme.title: Pressure's On
programme.sub-title: Classic Sunday Dishes Made in Weeknight Time
programme.desc: Get inspired with fast weeknight meals, including Classic Lasagna and Thai Green Curry, with host Vanessa Gianfrancesco.

programme.title: Pressure's On
programme.sub-title: Four Fresh Dinners that are Always on Time
programme.desc: Vanessa prepares teriyaki salmon and quiche Lorraine in a multi-cooker.

programme.title: VegHeadz
programme.desc: Spring into the kitchen with chef Pino Di Cerbo’s fresh seasonal menu.

programme.title: VegHeadz
programme.desc: Chef Pino Di Cerbo serves up brassicas, including stems and stalks from cauliflower and kohlrabi!

programme.title: VegHeadz
programme.desc: Chef Pino Di Cerbo creates a menu featuring sweet and smoky flavours.

programme.title: VegHeadz
programme.desc: Chef Pino Di Cerbo creates dishes featuring melons, including honeydew gazpacho and grilled cantaloupe.

programme.title: VegHeadz
programme.desc: Chef Pino Di Cerbo shares recipes to elevate the humble carrot.

programme.title: The Marilyn Denis Show
programme.desc: Making over a viewer’s sewing room; small space organizing tricks; Catherine Reitman & Mary Berg cook up 20-minute weeknight meals.

programme.title: The Marilyn Denis Show
programme.desc: Wheel of Experts! Giving their ultimate top tips for cleaning, fashion, cooking & decorating.

programme.title: The Marilyn Denis Show
programme.desc: 7 steps for a current & stylish home; convertible furniture for small spaces; Grey’s Anatomy stars Kevin McKidd & Greg Germann.

programme.title: The Marilyn Denis Show
programme.desc: Vegetable lasagna; what to plant in fall; tips on how to throw a zero waste party; stylish DIY storage solutions; best fall travel deals.

programme.title: The Marilyn Denis Show
programme.desc: Efficient ways to lay out & organize the kitchen, linen closet, & front hallway; cooking expert Mary Berg's make-ahead vegetarian chili.

programme.title: The Marilyn Denis Show
programme.desc: How to create a bathroom oasis with the latest trends; transitional teen bedroom décor; The Interior Design Show; a hearty weekend dish.

programme.title: The Marilyn Denis Show
programme.desc: A couple’s outdated kitchen gets a fabulous facelift; 5 reno-free ways to add storage & personality to your kitchen; Kortney & Dave Wilson.

programme.title: The Marilyn Denis Show
programme.desc: Mega Makeovers! 12 transformations in one hour.

programme.title: The Marilyn Denis Show
programme.desc: From playroom to stylish hangout; decorating with navy blue; separate zones in a small open concept space; New Orleans’ style crab cakes.

programme.title: The Marilyn Denis Show
programme.desc: Saving money on your home renos; fast track paying off your mortgage; spot a good deal at the grocery store; rotisserie chicken recipes.
